About Me

Crafting Stories That Convert

I’m a PR Manager and Marketing Supervisor with hands-on experience in EdTech marketing, public relations, content strategy, media production, event management, and lead-generation campaigns.

My work spans campaign ideation, visual direction, AI-assisted creative prompts, influencer collaborations, event coverage, exhibitions, and stakeholder coordination across universities, corporate training groups, graduation events, and awareness activations.

PR Manager
Marketing Supervisor
Creative Content Creator
AI-Assisted Creative Director

Creative direction for designs, videos, carousels, and brand campaigns.
